calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar May-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Douglas Provencher, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Crditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff's Witness: Gilda Alvarado, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Kim Corsaro ind. dba. San Francisco Bay Times as follows:
Damages $77,719.05
Prejudgment $8,154.07
Costs $ 380.00, for a total of $86,253.12
Judgment signed in open court.
